App.title: Free Loan Payoff Calculator – Pay Off Debt Faster
App.description: Free loan amortization calculator. See how extra monthly or annual payments save you thousands and cut years off your mortgage, car loan, or personal loan.

faq.q1: How does a loan payoff calculator work?
faq.a1: Enter your loan amount, interest rate, and repayment term. The calculator instantly shows your monthly payment, total interest cost, and a full amortization schedule. Add extra monthly or annual payments to see how much you can save.
faq.q2: How much can I save with extra payments?
faq.a2: Extra payments reduce your principal balance faster, which lowers the interest charged each month. Even a small extra payment of $50–$100 per month can save thousands in interest and cut years off a typical mortgage.
faq.a3: An amortization schedule is a table that breaks down every loan payment into its principal and interest components, showing how much of each payment goes to reducing your balance versus paying interest.
faq.a4: Yes, completely free with no registration required. All calculations run instantly in your browser with no data sent to any server.

seo.heading: Loan payoff calculator: purpose and how to use
seo.purposeBody: This page provides a free loan amortization and payoff calculator so you can estimate the total cost of borrowing, see how each payment splits between principal and interest, and measure how extra payments shorten the payoff timeline and reduce interest on mortgages, auto loans, student loans, and other fixed-rate loans.
seo.usageBody: Enter your loan amount, annual interest rate, and repayment term to view your monthly payment and a full amortization schedule. Optionally add monthly or annual extra payments to compare scenarios and see estimated interest savings and how many months you could remove from the loan. Calculations run locally in your browser.

footer.footer: Free amortization and payoff calculator — runs locally in your browser.
footer.disclaimer: Estimates are for educational purposes only and are not financial, legal, or tax advice.

aboutPage.metaDescription: Learn about the free Loan Payoff Calculator — a tool to help you understand your amortization schedule and plan extra payments to pay off debt faster.
aboutPage.title: About Loan Payoff Calculator
aboutPage.intro: Loan Payoff Calculator is a free, privacy-first tool that helps you understand exactly how your loan works — and how extra payments can save you thousands of dollars in interest.
aboutPage.whatBody: Enter your loan amount, interest rate, and term to instantly see your monthly payment and a full amortization schedule. Add optional extra monthly or annual payments to compare scenarios side by side.
aboutPage.whoBody: Anyone with a fixed-rate loan — mortgage, auto loan, student loan, or personal loan — who wants to plan smarter repayment and reduce total interest paid.
aboutPage.privacyBody: All calculations happen entirely in your browser. No personal data, financial information, or loan details are ever sent to our servers.

privacyPage.metaDescription: Privacy policy for Loan Payoff Calculator. We do not collect, store, or share any personal or financial data. All calculations run locally in your browser.
privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.dataBody: We do not collect, store, or transmit any personal or financial data. All loan calculations are performed locally in your browser and never leave your device.
privacyPage.cookiesBody: This site does not use tracking cookies or analytics. Your loan history is saved in your browser's local storage and can be cleared at any time.
privacyPage.thirdPartyBody: We use Google Fonts to load web fonts. Google may log your IP address when fonts are fetched. No other third-party services are used.
privacyPage.contactBody: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, you can reach us via the contact information on our website.

form.title: Loan Parameters
form.infoText: Extra payments—each month or once a year at the end of every 12 payments—can cut total interest and shorten the loan. The amount you enter matches the timing you select.

table.title: Amortization Schedule
table.subtitle: First-year breakdown with extra payments.
table.subtitleExpanded: First five years breakdown with extra payments.
table.empty: Enter loan details to see your schedule.
